feedback.text: I really appreciate the Digital Fairness Act, and Id love to see it explicitly protect games weve already bought. Right now theres no real endoflife plan, so titles youve paid for can just disappear when servers shut down or stores delist them (as groups like StopKillingGames have shown). It feels unfair to treat digital gamers this way, losing access to something you own really undermines trust in digital purchases.
